title: Buyer asks where a specific item is on order across all open POs
user_persona: Buyer or planner checking commitments for an item

conversation.user: Where is item ITM-300 currently on order? I need every open PO that has it on a line.

bot_must: query for PO lines where item_code=ITM-300 AND PO status in (Open/Authorised/Hold) and line not fully received/short-closed
return list: PO number, supplier, ordered qty, received qty, balance qty, need date

conversation.user: What's the total open quantity I have on order?

bot_must: return the top entry (oldest PO with open balance for this item)

evaluation_metrics.item_centric_query: query at line level, not header level
evaluation_metrics.aggregate_and_sort: follow-ups for total and oldest both work
